description: A classification of the role a partner organization plays in a project.

namedIndividuals.description: An organization providing centralized IT services for the project.
namedIndividuals.name: Centralized IT

namedIndividuals.description: An organization contributing data records to the IDS.
namedIndividuals.name: Data Contributor

namedIndividuals.description: An organization providing funding or institutional sponsorship for the IDS.
namedIndividuals.name: IDS Sponsor

namedIndividuals.description: An organization providing technical infrastructure for data linkage and analysis.
namedIndividuals.name: Infrastructure Provider

namedIndividuals.description: An organization providing executive or program leadership for the project.
namedIndividuals.name: Program Leadership

namedIndividuals.description: An organization providing subject matter expertise on the program or domain.
namedIndividuals.name: Program SME

namedIndividuals.description: An organization conducting research or analysis using the linked data.
namedIndividuals.name: Researcher

title: Project Partner Role

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.
@id.title: IRI
